manifest.title: NexusNet Neural Visualizer
manifest.description: Canonical living-neural visualization for the NexusNet brain, expert capsules, critique loops, and governed growth overlays.

modes.label: Engineering Mode
modes.description: Engineering-grade schematic view with explicit buses, labels, and operator clarity.

modes.label: Cinematic Mode
modes.description: Cinematic inspection mode with deeper glow, motion, and parallax from the same canonical topology.

topologies.subject: coder
topologies.description: Rectilinear coding lattice with patch buses and validation forks.

topologies.subject: strategist
topologies.description: Branching plan canopy with weighted objective forks.

topologies.subject: analyst
topologies.description: Dual comparator lobes linked by evidence bridges.

topologies.subject: researcher
topologies.description: Citation web with contradiction arcs and source-weighting rings.

topologies.subject: critique
topologies.role_hint: Arbiter, examiner, and skeptical safety gate.
topologies.description: Opposed hemispheres joined by an arbitration core and challenge ring.

topologies.subject: conversationalist
topologies.description: Braided dialog loops with continuity ribbons.

topologies.subject: toolsmith
topologies.role_hint: Tool schema discipline and chain recovery.
topologies.description: Port-switchboard mesh for schema-locked tool orchestration.

topologies.subject: security
topologies.description: Shield mesh with breach sentries and mitigation lanes.

topologies.subject: memory-weaver
topologies.description: Braided archive strands bridging episodic, semantic, and temporal memory.

topologies.subject: meta-reasoner
topologies.description: Mirrored synthesis lobes under a supervisory halo.

topologies.subject: router
topologies.description: Hub-and-spoke routing fabric with fallback spines.

topologies.subject: linguist
topologies.description: Syntax helix with dialect branches and paraphrase lanes.

topologies.subject: vision
topologies.description: Retina grid feeding a feature pyramid and grounding axis.

topologies.subject: audio
topologies.role_hint: ASR, spoken instruction grounding, and timing.
topologies.description: Waveform spiral wrapped in timestamp sensitivity rings.

topologies.subject: simulation
topologies.description: Orbiting rollout lanes with counterfactual branches.

topologies.subject: builder
topologies.description: Structural scaffold with assembly rails and rebuild loops.

topologies.subject: instructor
topologies.description: Pedagogical ladder with checkpoint rungs and remediation branches.

topologies.subject: intent-mapper
topologies.description: Funnel classifier cones with ambiguity prisms and risk gates.

topologies.subject: critic-historian
topologies.role_hint: Chronology repair and evidence-weighted historical critique.
topologies.description: Chronology rings crossed by source-conflict bridges.

topologies.subject: curriculum-architect
topologies.description: Auxiliary curriculum forge, not part of the authoritative core 19.
